title: The Coffee Talk Was Load-Bearing
big_statement: What organizations quietly lose when the assistant answers first

title: The Feeling
bullets: Work got faster
The workplace got quieter
Every answer a small rational win
Yet the organization feels thinner

title: The Unasked Question
bullets: The smallest unit of the change
Notice what silently does not happen
figure_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 1000 620' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><style>.f{opacity:1;animation:fade 2.4s ease forwards}.f2{animation-delay:.3s}.f3{animation-delay:.6s}.f4{animation-delay:.9s}.f5{animation-delay:1.2s}@keyframes fade{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><rect x='60' y='70' width='260' height='90' rx='10' fill='#e8a13c'/><text x='190' y='122' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='28' fill='#1e222a' text-anchor='middle'>Your question</text><line x1='320' y1='115' x2='430' y2='115' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='430,108 448,115 430,122' fill='#9aa0ab'/><rect x='448' y='70' width='300' height='90' rx='10' fill='none' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><text x='598' y='122' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='28' fill='#f2f0eb' text-anchor='middle'>Assistant answers</text><text x='60' y='230' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#9aa0ab'>What silently did not happen:</text><text class='f f2' x='80' y='300' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#f2f0eb'>— No one learns what you're working on</text><text class='f f3' x='80' y='360' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#f2f0eb'>— No mental map of what you know updated</text><text class='f f4' x='80' y='420' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#f2f0eb'>— No warm signal that experience is valued</text><text class='f f5' x='80' y='480' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#f2f0eb'>— No junior overhears and learns for free</text><text class='f f5' x='80' y='540' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='26' fill='#e8a13c'>Knowledge now in one head — gone by lunch</text></svg>

title: Load-Bearing
big_statement: The coffee talk was a load-bearing structure nobody engineered — so nobody notices when it's removed

title: A Public Autopsy: Stack Overflow
bullets: Questions per month, the shared coffee talk
Peak 2014 → ChatGPT 2022 → collapse
figure_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 1000 620' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><style>.line{stroke-dasharray:1200;stroke-dashoffset:0;animation:draw 2.6s ease forwards}@keyframes draw{from{stroke-dashoffset:1200}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}.lb{opacity:1;animation:f 1s ease .6s both}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><line x1='120' y1='100' x2='920' y2='100' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='1' opacity='.2'/><line x1='120' y1='293' x2='920' y2='293' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='1' opacity='.2'/><line x1='120' y1='520' x2='920' y2='520' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='1' opacity='.4'/><text x='90' y='108' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='22' fill='#9aa0ab' text-anchor='end'>200k</text><text x='90' y='300' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='22' fill='#9aa0ab' text-anchor='end'>108k</text><polyline class='line' points='150,457 400,100 760,293 900,499' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13c' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='400' cy='100' r='6' fill='#e8a13c'/><circle cx='760' cy='293' r='6' fill='#e8a13c'/><circle cx='900' cy='499' r='6' fill='#e8a13c'/><text class='lb' x='400' y='82' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb' text-anchor='middle'>~200k peak (2014)</text><text class='lb' x='760' y='275' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb' text-anchor='middle'>108k (Nov 2022)</text><text class='lb' x='150' y='445' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='22' fill='#9aa0ab' text-anchor='middle'>2009</text><text class='lb' x='900' y='540' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='22' fill='#e8a13c' text-anchor='middle'>−90%+ since</text></svg>

title: The Commons
big_statement: The questions did not disappear — the commons did

title: Four Things That Stop Happening
bullets: Name them — you can't defend what you can't point to

title: The Weak Tie
bullets: Microsoft: remote work siloed the network
Cross-group time fell ~a quarter
Weak ties withered first
AI is the accelerant

title: The Who-Knows-What Map
bullets: Teams know who knows things
Asking around refreshes the map
Ask only the assistant → map goes stale
Full of experts, unable to find them

title: Cognitive Debt
bullets: MIT: weakest brain connectivity, lowest recall
CMU: more trust in AI, less critical thinking
Juniors ship more, understand less
Seniors mentor less

title: The Mirror: We've Run This Before
bullets: Work across an interface without shared context
Two decades called it outsourcing
figure_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 1000 620' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><style>.c{opacity:1;animation:f 1s ease both}.c2{animation-delay:.5s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><g class='c'><rect x='70' y='90' width='380' height='420' rx='14' fill='#1e222a' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><text x='260' y='150' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='30' fill='#9aa0ab' text-anchor='middle'>Codified interface</text><text x='100' y='220' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Tickets & handoffs</text><text x='100' y='270' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Generated documents</text><text x='100' y='320' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Tacit knowledge lost</text><text x='100' y='390' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#e8a13c'>Then: the hollow</text><text x='100' y='425' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#e8a13c'>corporation</text><text x='100' y='475' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#e8a13c'>Now: quiet outsourcing</text></g><g class='c c2'><rect x='550' y='90' width='380' height='420' rx='14' fill='#1e222a' stroke='#e8a13c' stroke-width='2'/><text x='740' y='150' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='30' fill='#e8a13c' text-anchor='middle'>Shared context</text><text x='580' y='220' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Joint rituals</text><text x='580' y='270' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Rotating across interface</text><text x='580' y='320' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Shared ownership</text><text x='580' y='370' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#f2f0eb'>• Co-located phases</text><text x='580' y='445' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#e8a13c'>The cure: engineered</text><text x='580' y='480' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='24' fill='#e8a13c'>human contact</text></g></svg>

title: Co-located Strangers
bullets: Share an employer and a floor plan
Exchange context through tickets alone
Outsource the org to the model, no contract
Human connection is now the hard argument

title: What This Is Not Saying
bullets: Much AI displaced deserved to die
Valuable exchange free-rode on the necessary
Remote work loosened the fabric first
DORA: AI amplifies what's already there

title: The Merge Ritual
bullets: Status reporting is dead — a gift
Failure mode: everyone aligns with their own assistant
Ask where do we disagree — and is it right?

title: Argument
big_statement: Argument is not friction in the process — argument is the process

title: Documentation & Review
bullets: Argued document is cement; unresisted is wallpaper
Keep the decision record a human argument
Review together: quality gate + apprenticeship + map-refresh
The last place your next seniors are made

title: At Eye Level
bullets: Leaders: measure the fabric, not just velocity
ICs: take one question a day to a human
Being findable keeps you a colleague

title: Being a Good Colleague
big_statement: Being a good colleague was always kindness — it turns out it's also infrastructure

title: Take the Long Way Around
bullets: The machine holds what we tell it
Not what we are together
Some questions should still pass a human
The answer was never all the question was for

title: Sources
bullets: Nature Human Behaviour, Microsoft 61k: nature.com/articles/s41562-021-01196-4
Your Brain on ChatGPT, MIT: media.mit.edu/publications/your-brain-on-chatgpt
